title: Foreign Language Preparatory School’s Accreditation Success
content:
Foreign Language Preparatory School’s Accreditation Success

Üsküdar University Foreign Languages Preparatory School is fully granted “Pearson Assured Accreditation” with full marks and has established its success.

Üsküdar University Foreign Languages Preparatory School is granted “Pearson Assured Accreditation” with full marks in all areas including student acceptance, education-training modules, student evaluation system and class and infrastructure specifications.

Üsküdar University President Prof. Nevzat Tarhan stated that Pearson accreditation will provide great contributions to the students and added “Üsküdar University holds an accreditation in language school now.

This denotes that these certifications are documented in terms of international validity and our students' competence as well as skill acquisition. This is a great opportunity for our University.”

Üsküdar News Agency (ÜNA)

Üsküdar News Agency (ÜHA)
